<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band06_chunk002.pdf#page=17 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band06 p82 -->

<!-- header: STADT FREISING -->

<!-- header: STADT FREISING -->


[[File:Band06_chunk002_p017_img001.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band06_chunk002_p017_img002.jpg|thumb|12 Göttliche Liebe гт Göttliche Kraft]]



[[File:Band06_chunk002_p017_img003.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band06_chunk002_p017_img004.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band06_chunk002_p017_img005.jpg|thumb|7 Barmherzigkeit 0 D:---1 1 '.]]



[[File:Band06_chunk002_p017_img006.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band06_chunk002_p017_img007.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band06_chunk002_p017_img008.jpg|thumb]]
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band06 p83 -->
